camera package¶

Submodules¶

camera.realsense_camera module¶

RealSense camera wrapper.

Supported sources: color, left_ir, right_ir, depth, colored_depth.

class camera.realsense_camera.RealSenseCamera(cfg: RealSenseConfig)¶

Bases: object

Single-stream RealSense capture.

read() → ndarray¶
start() → None¶
stop() → None¶

Bases: object

height: int¶
